Description: Rewrite cluster manifests after categorization and keep the earlier pipeline stages working on already categorized day folders.

Stories.StoryName: Rewrite cluster manifest with category metadata
Stories.StoryDescription: Update `cluster_manifest.json` with category folders in member paths and cluster-level categorization metadata such as category name, rationale, and source filename.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The post-categorization manifest matches the filesystem and stores the AI classification metadata for each cluster.

Stories.StoryDescription: Load accepted photos recursively from day folders while excluding `rejected`, `not_photo`, and manifest files so reruns still work after categorization.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Epic 2 and Epic 3 can run safely on already categorized folders and automated tests cover the recursive load behavior.

Stories.StoryDescription: Run categorization after Epic 3 when enabled and extend summaries and logs with classified cluster counts, moved photo counts, and manifest rewrite counts.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The pipeline can optionally run categorization, the full test suite passes, and the run summary reports Epic 4 outcomes.
